tokenHint: Access tokens can be used to access open APIs and for continuous deployment. A token is only shown once upon creation. If you lose it, please create a new one.
deleteTokenConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete token {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
expireTimeError: Expiration date must be later than now
passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
copyDescription: The access token is active immediately and shown only once. If you lose it, please create a new one.
